families.datasetBasis: Governed public defaults and illustrative screening assumptions
requiredDisclaimers: Reference dietary calculations are internal screening support only and are not an official submission engine.

families.datasetBasis: Stub adapter using the native deterministic kernel only
requiredDisclaimers: Adapter stub outputs are compatibility placeholders and are not regulator-facing submission results.

families.datasetBasis: Public compatibility harness using Dietary MCP contracts plus governed public metadata
requiredDisclaimers: No claim of official PRIMo engine equivalence, proprietary dataset reproduction, or regulatory endorsement is implied.
EFSA PRIMo adapter outputs are for internal review or consultation-oriented compatibility checks only.

families.datasetBasis: Public compatibility harness using Dietary MCP contracts plus official DEEM metadata
requiredDisclaimers: No claim of official DEEM engine equivalence, proprietary dataset reproduction, or regulatory endorsement is implied.
EPA DEEM adapter outputs are for compatibility review only and are not official submission calculations.

errata.title: Official DEEM errata list is published separately
errata.description: EPA maintains DEEM errata outside the installer package; compatibility review should consider that errata may affect the official engine independently of the Dietary MCP harness.
